name: Plated Steelcaps

passives.name: Plating
passives.effects: Reduces all incoming {{tip|basic damage}} by 10% (''excluding from [[turret]] attacks'').

effects_structured.raw: Reduces incoming basic damage by 10%, excluding turret attacks and on-hit effect damage.

simpleDescription: Enhances Move Speed and reduces incoming basic attack damage

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Plating is a continuous incoming-damage reducer for damage instances tagged as basic damage; the reduction is not limited to ordinary auto attacks.
Player-visible behavior: turret shot damage and on-hit effect damage are excluded, while valid basic-damage instances from abilities/items can still be reduced.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Plated Steelcaps
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Plating exclusion rules and basic-damage classification behavior
